actionCalls.name: Log_Count_of_Products_Sub_Product_Family_IV_Therapy
actionCalls.label: Log Count of Products - Sub Product Family IV Therapy

value.stringValue: Count of Products - Sub Product Family IV Therapy

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Getting_Patient_Agreement_Configurations
actionCalls.label: Log - Error Getting Patient Agreement Configurations

actionCalls.name: Log_Items_For_Sub_Product_Family
actionCalls.label: Log Items For Sub Product Family

actionCalls.name: Log_Patient_Agreement_Configuration_Added_Into_Collection
actionCalls.label: Log Patient Agreement Configuration Added Into Collection

value.stringValue: Patient Agreement Configuration Added Into Collection

actionCalls.name: Log_Patient_Agreement_Configurations_For_Loop_Completed
actionCalls.label: Log Patient Agreement Configurations For Loop Completed

value.stringValue: Patient Agreement Configurations For Loop Completed

actionCalls.name: Log_Product_Family_No_Items_Exist
actionCalls.label: Log Product Family No Items Exist

actionCalls.name: Log_There_Are_Forms_to_Send
actionCalls.label: Log There Are Forms to Send

actionCalls.name: Log_There_Are_No_Forms_to_Send
actionCalls.label: Log There Are No Forms to Send

value.stringValue: There Are No Forms to Send

assignments.description: Assign Current Family Values from MSP to String variable to be used in a filter. Add ; to beginning and end of the selection string to help with exact matching in the filter
assignments.name: Assign_Current_Family_Values_to_variables
assignments.label: Assign Current Family Values to variables

assignments.description: Because filters assign a new collection we bring the filtered records to a unified collection to be used later.
assignments.name: Assign_Filtered_Items_to_Collection_Product_Family
assignments.label: Assign Filtered Items to Collection - Product Family

assignments.description: Because filters assign a new collection we bring the filtered records to a unified collection to be used later.
assignments.name: Assign_Filtered_Items_to_Collection_Sub_Product_Family
assignments.label: Assign Filtered Items to Collection - Sub Product Family

assignments.name: Assign_Patient_Agreement_Config_Id_to_Collection
assignments.label: Assign Patient Agreement Config Id to Collection

assignments.description: We assign the loop variable to our collection of Agreements to send out via a sub flow.
assignments.name: Create_Patient_Agreement_Configuration_Collection
assignments.label: Create Patient Agreement Configuration Collection

assignments.description: We get the number of products that came from the Product Family Filter
assignments.name: Set_Count_From_Filter_Product_Family
assignments.label: Set Count From Filter - Product Family

assignments.description: We get the number of products that came from the Sub Product Family Filter
assignments.name: Set_Count_From_Filter_Sub_Product_Family
assignments.label: Set Count From Filter - Sub Product Family

collectionProcessors.description: We want to find all of the products that match the current form's product family.
collectionProcessors.name: Filter_Line_Items_By_Product_Family
collectionProcessors.label: Filter Line Items By Product Family

collectionProcessors.description: We want to find all of the products that match the current form's sub product family. There are some forms that won't be setup this way; but we account for them in the next decision node
collectionProcessors.name: Filter_Line_Items_By_Sub_Product_Family
collectionProcessors.label: Filter Line Items By Sub Product Family

collectionProcessors.description: Remove At-Home Blood Test products from the opportunity line items so they do not trigger patient agreement creation. AHB products should not result in Informed Consent or Blood Panel Questionnaire documents. Uses CONTAINS to match because OLI Name includes the Opportunity name as a prefix. If the AHB configuration is not found, all items pass through safely.
collectionProcessors.name: Filter_Out_AHB_Products
collectionProcessors.label: Filter Out AHB Products

collectionProcessors.description: We sort by the Product Family and Sub Product family to make the debugging purpose easier.
collectionProcessors.name: Sort_Opportunity_Line_Items
collectionProcessors.label: Sort Opportunity Line Items

decisions.description: We make sure that there are forms to send before calling the sub flow
decisions.name: Are_There_Forms_to_Send
decisions.label: Are There Forms to Send

decisions.description: We check to make sure that the we have items; because if there isn't there is no point of continuing.
decisions.name: Are_There_Items_On_The_Opportunity
decisions.label: Are There Items On The Opportunity

decisions.description: We match the patients' gender with what is configured and if match we continue.
decisions.name: Does_Patient_Gender_Match_the_Agreement_Gender
decisions.label: Does Patient Gender Match the Agreement Gender

decisions.description: Since we are doing a loop over the consent forms we could run into a potential chance of creating duplicate Agreement Configurations. This check just makes sure that we don't add the same one more than once.
decisions.name: Have_We_Added_Patient_Agreement_Configuration_Already
decisions.label: Have We Added Patient Agreement Configuration Already

decisions.description: We need to check if the form is Gender Specific so we can make sure we don't send something for the wrong gender
decisions.name: Is_Form_Gender_Specific
decisions.label: Is Form Gender Specific

decisions.description: If there are items that match the forms product family we continue to the sub product family filter.
decisions.name: What_is_the_Count_of_Products_Product_Family
decisions.label: What is the Count of Products - Product Family

decisions.description: Here we can override any specific forms that don't have a sub family or make sure that if they do have a sub family that those items exist on this opportunity.
decisions.name: What_is_the_Count_of_Products_Sub_Product_Family
decisions.label: What is the Count of Products - Sub Product Family

Flow.description: This flow will run thru the products on the opportunity and based on the product family and sub family and find all patient agreement configurations that are needed and will send to a subflow to create the patient agreements.
Flow.interviewLabel: Autolaunch - Send Patient Agreements - Product Based {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Autolaunch - Create Patient Agreements - Product Based

loops.description: Loop through the consent forms to figure out which ones we need to send to the patient
loops.name: Loop_Through_Patient_Agreement_Configurations
loops.label: Loop Through Patient Agreement Configurations

loops.description: This will loop thru all of the patient agreements and get the Patient Agreement Id.
loops.name: Loop_thru_Patient_Agreements
loops.label: Loop thru Patient Agreements

recordLookups.description: The subflow needs the Account record so this is where we grab it. It is protected here and is one less DML action if there are no forms that need to be sent.
recordLookups.name: Get_Account_Record
recordLookups.label: Get Account Record

recordLookups.description: Get At-Home Blood product names from Custom Metadata so we can exclude AHB products from patient agreement processing. AHB purchases should not generate Informed Consent or Blood Panel Questionnaire documents.
recordLookups.name: Get_AHB_Configuration
recordLookups.label: Get AHB Configuration

recordLookups.description: We get all of the active Patient Agreement Forms that we will use to loop over and filter out any items that match
recordLookups.name: Get_All_Patient_Agreement_Configurations
recordLookups.label: Get All Patient Agreement Configurations

recordLookups.description: We get all of the Opportunity Line items that is needed for this flow
recordLookups.name: Get_Opportunity_Line_Items
recordLookups.label: Get Opportunity Line Items

variables.description: This will make sure we don't over do the checks on the Biocanic Id
variables.name: num_NumOfChecks
